title: shaba` #7650
definition:
1) to swear, adjure
    1a) (Qal) sworn (participle)
    1b) (Niphal)
        1b1) to swear, take an oath
        1b2) to swear (of Jehovah by Himself)
        1b3) to curse
    1c) (Hiphil)
        1c1) to cause to take an oath
        1c2) to adjure
